arts.ttl: Preview: Las Palmas vs. Real Valladolid - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's La Liga clash between Las Palmas and Real Valladolid, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

Las Palmas have won four of their last six to move two points clear of the dropzone, a record they'll be confident of extending in the welcome of Real Valladolid. Saturday's visitors foot La Liga wit...
